title: The Destiny of Marge
about: The Destiny of Marge is a catchphrase derived from a viral video of TikToker @diddydiana playing the TikTok Effects game "Assign Food," in which players must assign given food items to members of the Simpson family, saying what sounds like, "The destiny of Marge" while dragging a plate of fast food over Marge Simpson's image. The video was uploaded in late December 2025 and became the subject of a meme trend in January and February 2026, where users recreate the video as accurately as possible, similar to accuracy reenactment memes.
origin:
On December 30th, 2025, TikToker [1] @diddydiana posted a video playing the TikTok Effect game "Assign Food." In the game, four starving versions of the Simpson family are shown at the bottom of the screen. Food items are lowered onto screen one-by-one and the player must assign the food to each family member to fatten them up.

In the video, she says while assigning food, "Lisa is vegetarian. Bart likes cake. The destiny of Marge. Yep, he's a steak man. I seem to I know the Simpsons." The video gained over 4.9 million views in about two months. It is unconfirmed if she actually says "The destiny of Marge," as her voice comes across unclear in the video.
